days.title: Arrival in Tokyo
days.subtitle: Exploring local food scene

timeline.title: Arrive at Narita International Airport
timeline.detail: Upon landing, proceed through customs. Purchase a SIM card or Wi-Fi hotspot for easy internet access during your stay.

timeline.title: Take Narita Express to Tokyo Station
timeline.detail: Board the Narita Express train for a smooth and convenient 1-hour journey to Tokyo Station. Enjoy comfortable seating and scenic views.

timeline.title: Check in to Hotel Monterey Hanzomon
timeline.detail: Check into your hotel located near Hanzomon Station. Relax and freshen up. The hotel offers great views of the Imperial Palace.

timeline.title: Lunch at Tsukiji Outer Market
timeline.detail: Savor fresh sushi and seafood at this iconic market. Try the grilled seafood skewers and nigiri from vendors, enjoy the vibrant food scene.

timeline.title: Visit Senso-ji Temple
timeline.detail: Explore Tokyo's oldest temple, Senso-ji in Asakusa. Take in the stunning architecture and vibrant atmosphere, don't forget to grab a fortune charm.

timeline.title: Dinner at Ichiran Ramen
timeline.detail: Indulge in delicious tonkotsu ramen at the famous Ichiran Ramen. Enjoy the unique dining experience where you can customize noodle firmness and spice levels.

localTips: Purchase a Suica card at the airport for convenient travel on trains and buses.
Try the seasonal flavors of mochi and other sweets in Asakusa.
Make dinner reservations at popular restaurants to avoid long waits.

days.title: Tokyo Cultural Day
days.subtitle: Art, shopping, and local delicacies

timeline.title: Breakfast at your hotel
timeline.detail: Enjoy a Japanese-style breakfast at Hotel Monterey Hanzomon featuring grilled fish, rice, and miso soup to start your day.

timeline.title: Visit TeamLab Borderless
timeline.detail: Explore this immersive digital art museum in Odaiba, showcasing unique interactive installations. Be entranced by the blend of art and technology.

timeline.title: Lunch at Aoyama Flower Market Tea House
timeline.detail: Dine surrounded by beautiful flowers at this charming café. Try their floral teas and seasonal lunch sets for a unique experience.
timeline.mapQuery: Aoyama Flower Market Tea House, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Explore Harajuku
timeline.detail: Stroll through the vibrant streets of Harajuku. Don't miss the iconic Takeshita Street filled with unique shops, trendy fashion, and quirky snacks.

timeline.title: Dinner at Gyukatsu Kyoto Kokura
timeline.detail: Experience gyukatsu - breaded and fried beef cutlets. Cook your beef to your preferred doneness right at your table.

timeline.title: Shibuya Crossing
timeline.detail: Experience the hustle and bustle of Shibuya Crossing. Take in the iconic views and capture the vibrant night scene, perfect for photography.

localTips: Use the Apple/Google Pay at most stores for contactless payment.
Visit during weekdays to avoid large crowds at museums.
Check out the basement floors of department stores for high-quality food options.

days.title: Departure from Tokyo
days.subtitle: Last-minute snacks and shopping

timeline.title: Breakfast at local café
timeline.detail: Grab a morning coffee and a pastry at a nearby local café. Enjoy the daily Tokyo ambiance to wrap up your trip.

timeline.title: Last-minute shopping in Ginza
timeline.detail: Spend your morning exploring Ginza, Tokyo's upscale shopping district. Hunt for souvenirs and high-quality Japanese goods to take home.

timeline.title: Lunch at Sushi Zanmai
timeline.detail: Enjoy one last sushi meal at this famous chain. The fresh fish and generous cuts will make for a perfect farewell to Tokyo.

timeline.title: Head to Narita Airport
timeline.detail: Make your way to Narita Airport by taking the Narita Express. Plan to arrive early for stress-free check-in and security procedures.

timeline.title: Arrive at Narita International Airport
timeline.detail: Finish up your Tokyo adventure. Get ready for your departure and reflect on the amazing culinary experiences.

localTips: Keep an eye on train schedules to avoid missing your ride.
Set your mobile devices to avoid roaming charges.
Consider purchasing snacks at convenience stores for affordable last-minute bites.

hotels.name: Hotel Monterey Hanzomon
hotels.address: 1 Chome-1-1 Hanzomon, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 102-0092, Japan

budget.note: Round trip from Singapore to Tokyo

urgent.note: Tickets often sell out weeks in advance.

urgent.label: Reserve Ichiran Ramen
urgent.note: Highly recommended to make a reservation for peak times.
